subject: Part 1: CPS Composite Query API and Service Layer
commit_message:
Part 1: CPS Composite Query API and Service Layer

A new query endpoint to process composite query operations.

- Added new endpoint getNodesByDataspaceAndAnchorAndPayloadV2 in
  QueryRestController and OpenAPI definition (cpsQueryV2.yml)
- Added new method executeCompositeQuery in CpsFacade and CpsFacadeImpl
  to handle composite query requests
- Added new method queryCompositeQuery in CpsQueryService and
  CpsQueryServiceImpl to orchestrate composite query execution
- Added Java POJO CompositeQuery.java which defines the structure of a
  composite query
- Added stub CompositeQueryProcessor as placeholder for core algorithm
  implementation (Part 2)

Issue-ID: CPS-3238
Change-Id: Iffb68e0beb6f90df26a50c78f798368500fdaeb9
Signed-off-by: Arpit Singh6 <AS00745003@techmahindra.com>
